---
title: "01_time_desc"
author: "Stróbl Anita"
date: "2026-04-09"
output: html_document
---

``` {r packages, message = FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(psych) 
library(rstatix)
library(lme4)        
library(lmerTest)    
library(performance) 
library(sjPlot) 
library(MuMIn)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)
library(gtsummary)
library(flextable)
library(writexl)

```

``` {r import database}

dat_raw <- read_excel("RE_E_merge_1_87.xlsx")

```

``` {r process database}

dat <- dat_raw %>%
  mutate(prod_int = as.numeric(prod_int)) %>% 
  mutate(
    ref_category = case_when(
      ref_frame %in% c(38, 39) ~ "0,65 mp (rövid)",
      ref_frame %in% c(80, 81, 82) ~  "1,35 mp (közepes)",
      ref_frame %in% c(109, 110, 111, 112) ~ "1,85 mp (hosszú)",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ref_category)) %>% 
  mutate(ref_category = factor(ref_category, 
                               levels = c("0,65 mp (rövid)", 
                                          "1,35 mp (közepes)", 
                                          "1,85 mp (hosszú)"))) %>%
  mutate(sex = factor(sex, 
                      levels = c("female", "male"), 
                      labels = c("Nő", "Férfi"))) %>%
  mutate(group = factor(group, 
                        levels = c("sz_hr", "bp_hr", "normal"), 
                        labels = c("Magas szkizofrénia-kockázat", 
                                   "Magas bipoláris zavar kockázat", 
                                   "Kontrollcsoport")))

# write_csv(dat, "databases/dat_processed.csv")

```

``` {r demography}

# library(gtsummary)
# library(flextable)
# library(writexl)

# 1. Egyedi személyek kinyerése
dat_dem <- dat %>%
  distinct(ID, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% 
  select(group, sex) 

# 2. Táblázat generálása a gtsummary csomaggal
table_dem <- dat_dem %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = group, # Ez bontja szét az oszlopokat a három csoportodra
    label = list(sex ~ "Nem")) %>%
  add_overall(col_label = "**Létszám**") %>% 
  modify_header(label = "") %>%
  bold_labels() 

# Táblázat megjelenítése
table_dem

# Táblázat átalakítása és mentése
# table_dem %>%
  # as_flex_table() %>%                              
  # save_as_docx(path = "tables/dem_table.docx")  
# table_dem %>%
  # as_tibble() %>%                                  
  # write_xlsx(path = "tables/dem_table.xlsx")      

```

``` {r descripives}

# 1. A leíró statisztikák kiszámolása
dat_descr <- dat %>%
  group_by(ID, group, ref_category) %>% 
  summarise(prod_mean = mean(prod_int, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(group, ref_category) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),                                         
    Mean = mean(prod_mean, na.rm = TRUE),             
    SD = sd(prod_mean, na.rm = TRUE),                 
    SE = SD / sqrt(N)) %>%                             
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(across(c(Mean, SD, SE), ~ round(.x, 2)))

print(dat_descr)

# 2. Táblázat formázása és mentése
table_descr <- dat_descr %>%
  flextable() %>%
  set_header_labels(
    group = "Csoport",
    ref_category = "Referencia idő",
    N = "Esetszám (N)",
    Mean = "Átlag (mp)",
    SD = "Szórás (SD)",
    SE = "Stand. hiba (SE)") %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%     
  autofit() %>%           
  bold(part = "header")   

# save_as_docx(table_descr, path = "tables/descr_table.docx")
# write_xlsx(dat_descr, path = "tables/descr_table.xlsx")

```

``` {r descr visualization}

dat_plot_descr <- dat %>%
  group_by(ID, group, ref_category) %>% 
  summarise(prod_mean = mean(prod_int, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()
  
colors <- c("Kontrollcsoport" = "#66C2A5", 
               "Magas bipoláris zavar kockázat" = "#FC8D62", 
               "Magas szkizofrénia-kockázat" = "#BC80BD")

plot_bp_descr <- ggplot(dat_plot_descr, aes(x = ref_category, y = prod_mean, fill = group)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(0.65, 1.35, 1.85), 
             color = "darkgrey", 
             linetype = "dashed", 
             linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.color = "grey30", outlier.shape = 16, outlier.size = 1,
               alpha = 0.9, color = "grey30", linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Vizsgálati csoport",
                    labels = c("Kontrollcsoport",
                               "Magas bipoláris zavar kockázat",
                               "Magas szkizofrénia-kockázat"),
                    values = colors) + 
  labs(
    title = "Reprodukált időtartamok a csoportonként",
    x = "Referencia inger",
    y = "Reprodukált idő",
    fill = "Vizsgálati csoport") +
  theme_minimal()

print(plot_bp_descr)

ggsave("plots/plot_bp_descr.png", plot = plot_bp_descr, width = 20, height = 12, units = "cm", dpi = 300)

```
``` {r}

# --- 1. ADATELŐKÉSZÍTÉS ---

# Először meghatározzuk a résztvevők globális sorrendjét
id_order <- dat_lmer %>%
  group_by(ID, group) %>%
  summarise(global_mean = mean(prod_int, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(group, global_mean) %>%
  pull(ID)

plot_data_aligned <- dat_lmer %>%
  filter(ref_category %in% c("0,65 mp (rövid)", "1,35 mp (közepes)", "1,85 mp (hosszú)")) %>%
  mutate(ID = factor(ID, levels = id_order)) %>%
  mutate(target_time = as.numeric(str_extract(ref_category, "[0-9,]+") %>% str_replace(",", ".")))

# Segéd-adatbázis a vízszintes célvonalakhoz
hline_data <- data.frame(
  ref_category = c("0,65 mp (rövid)", "1,35 mp (közepes)", "1,85 mp (hosszú)"),
  target_time = c(0.65, 1.35, 1.85)
)

# --- 2. ÁBRÁZOLÁS ---

cv_colors <- c("Kontrollcsoport" = "#66C2A5", 
               "Magas bipoláris zavar kockázat" = "#FC8D62", 
               "Magas szkizofrénia-kockázat" = "#BC80BD")

plot_aligned <- ggplot(plot_data_aligned, aes(x = ID, y = prod_int, color = group)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 0.8) +
    geom_hline(data = hline_data, aes(yintercept = target_time), 
             linetype = "dashed", color = "black", size = 0.7, alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_grid(ref_category ~ group, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 3)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cv_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Időreprodukciós válaszok eloszlása",
    y = "Reprodukált időtartam (másodperc)",
    x = "Résztvevők"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray95", color = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

print(plot_aligned)

ggsave("plots/plot_3x3_aligned.png", plot = plot_aligned, width = 25, height = 14, units = "cm", dpi = 300)

```
